reviews.comment:
Pésima  atención,  me echaron con la mirada apenas  cruce la puerta por que eran cerca de 24 hs , un gordo muy mala onda !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, they looked at me as soon as I walked through the door because it was about 24 hours, a very mean fat guy!!!!

reviews.comment:
Como toda estación de servicio del ACA  muy prolija el parque cuidado y prolijo. No me gustó el Shop, nos quisieron cobrar 1 sándwiche chiquitito 600 mangos unos ladri... me fui a comer a la Shell de al lado mucho más barato.
Gente no maten al que va a comprar, que es el que siempre gasta mientras carga combustible!

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACA service stations, the parking lot is very clean and well-maintained. I didn't like the convenience store; they tried to charge us 600 pesos for a tiny sandwich—what a rip-off! I went to eat at the Shell station next door, which was much cheaper. People, don't rip off the customers; they're the ones who always spend money while filling up!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPMGRMSm5nRRAB
